payload.label: couch
payload.long_description: Close-up of a dark glossy leather three-seat couch with padded, vertically segmented back cushions and stitched seat panels; right armrest and the right portion of the couch are visible and the object is partially cropped at the image edge, estimated about 0.8 m from the camera.
